query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_users_past_14_days,
  SUM(CASE WHEN subscriptionStatus != 'active' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as unpaid_past_trial
FROM users 
WHERE createdAt < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 14 DAY);
command:

  COUNT(*) as total_users_past_14_days,
  SUM(CASE WHEN subscriptionStatus != 'active' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as unpaid_past_trial
